$comment: Issue #1350 Mechanism A skip-manifest for adversarial-merge-gate.sh. The hook fail-CLOSED denies trace validation skips unless an entry here matches. Pre-populated with the legitimate light-mode skip (when SOLVE_DEPTH=light, solve-critic.json is not produced and trace validation has nothing to compare against). Adding new entries requires (a) category in {light_mode_skip, recovery_skip, audit_only_skip}, (b) non-empty justification. Schema enforced by hook_bypass_manifest_completeness coherence rule.

schema.skip_entries[].solve_depth_value: The exact SOLVE_DEPTH value that triggers this skip (e.g., 'light').
schema.skip_entries[].justification: Why this skip is structurally legitimate. Required, non-empty.

skip_entries.justification: Light-mode /solve produces resolve-challenger.json only — no solve-critic.json. The change-challenge artifact has no full-mode trace to validate against; the per-item label match against resolve-challenger is performed in the resolve-challenge branch (lines 14-68 of adversarial-merge-gate.sh), not change-challenge. Skipping change-challenge trace validation in light mode is structurally correct.
